core.sustainability.utils.time_aware_factors module

Time-aware grid factors for future enhancement.

Carbon intensity varies by time of day due to: - Solar generation (day/night) - Wind patterns - Grid demand

This module provides infrastructure for time-aware calculations.

class core.sustainability.utils.time_aware_factors.TimeAwareGridFactors(grid_manager)[source]

Bases: object

Time-aware grid intensity factors.

This is a placeholder for future enhancement. Currently returns constant factors.

get_factor_at_time(country_code: str, timestamp: datetime | None = None) → float[source]

Get carbon intensity factor for specific time.

Parameters:

  • country_code – ISO country code

  • timestamp – Time of measurement (default: now)

Returns:

Carbon intensity multiplier (1.0 = average)

Note

This is a simplified model. Real implementation would use grid operator data or forecasts.
